title: [codereview] hkdf.c mixes tinycrypt and monocypher without Kconfig guard
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/hkdf.c:17 includes <monocypher.h> for crypto_wipe but the subsystem may use different crypto backend. See related beads project-LICHEN-9nrr. Also, TC_CRYPTO_SUCCESS and TC_SHA256_DIGEST_SIZE from tinycrypt. Ensure consistent with oscore Kconfig. P3 correctness. File as codereview. Depends on project-LICHEN-7yu8
